title: Preclinical dose response study shows NR2E3 can attenuate retinal degeneration in the retinitis pigmentosa mouse model RhoP23H+/−
snippet: Study demonstrates effectiveness of different doses of NR2E3 at reducing retinal degeneration and informs dose selection for clinical trials

title: CRISPR start, RP first, 50-year case
snippet: By Keng Jin Lee and Kanaga Rajan

title: Genetic and Clinical Findings in an Ethnically Diverse Cohort with Retinitis Pigmentosa Associated with Pathogenic Variants in CERKL
snippet: CERKL mutations are an uncommon cause of arRP, but they are a significant cause of disease in populations with founder mutations

title: CLRN1 Is Nonessential in the Mouse Retina but Is Required for Cochlear Hair Cell Development
snippet: Mutations in the CLRN1 gene cause Usher syndrome type 3 (USH3), a human disease characterized by progressive blindness and deafness.
